---
title: Curriculum vitæ
description: "Chunyi Lin's CV"
date: 2026-04-20
title-block-banner: true
published-title: CV last updated
freeze: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
#title-block-header .description {
    display: none;
}

.cv-pdf-embed {
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
    height: 80vh;
    min-height: 42rem;
    border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15));
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .cv-pdf-embed {
        height: 70vh;
        min-height: 32rem;
    }
}
</style>
```

{{< pdf https://r2.chunyi-lin.com/cv/99-placeholder.pdf button="Download current CV" class="cv-pdf-embed" >}}
